query: ArogyaSutra news OR trending OR launch 2026

results.title: Instagram
results.content:
🌍 Save the Date!  
  
The 11th World Ayurveda Congress & Arogya Expo 2026, themed “Integrative Ayurveda for Global Health,” will be held in Bhubaneswar, Odisha, from 10–13 December 2026.  
  
Organized by the World Ayurveda Foundation with the active support of the Ministry of AYUSH, Government of India, and the Government of Odisha, in partnership with CCRAS and other leading organizations, the event will bring together global experts, researchers, practitioners, and industry leaders to advance Ayurveda’s role in global healthcare.  
  
Join the movement towards a preventive, personalized, sustainable, and accessible healthcare future. ##### 📊 应用（垂直领域、多模态、代码生成） [...] ### 📈 ArXiv AI 研究日报 | 2026-06-13

#### 今日速览

今日投稿呈现出两大核心趋势：智能体的“形神兼备”与推理过程的深度洞察。一方面，研究不仅关注LLM Agent的工具使用（#1, #15），更强调其知识编排能力（#7）、记忆进化（#1）以及评估体系的标准化（#26）。另一方面，学界开始深入剖析推理过程的因果性（#30）和组合性（#13, #17），并探索类比推理（#2）等更高级的认知模式。此外，多智能体系统的奖励建模（#32）和鲁棒优化（#28）、以及在医疗（#39）等垂直领域的应用也取得了显著进展。

#### 重点论文

##### 🧠 大语言模型（架构、训练、对齐、评估）

EvoArena: Tracking Memory Evolution for Robust LLM Agents in Dynamic Environments

Learning to Reason by Analogy via Retrieval-Augmented Reinforcement Fine-Tuning

SkMTEB: Slovak Massive Text Embedding Benchmark and Model Adaptation

Beyond Uniform Tokens: Adaptive Compression for Time Series Language Models

One Polluted Page Is Enough: Evaluating Web Content Pollution in Generative Recommenders

results.content:
logo

# Grand Launch of “Nirogata Ke Sutra” (Secrets of Well-Being) Book Highlights the Timeless Wisdom of Indian Tradition for a Healthy and Balanced Life

Avatar

New Delhi, June 7– The book “Nirogata Ke Sutra – In the Light of Gurbani and the Shrimad Bhagavad Gita” (Secrets of Well-Being) was formally launched at a grand ceremony held on June 5, 2026, at the Constitution Club, New Delhi. The event brought together distinguished personalities from the fields of spirituality, social service, education, and public life.
